description: Distribute services across providers based on strengths

frontend_static_assets.reason: AWS CloudFront has best global CDN performance

api_gateway.reason: AWS API Gateway has enterprise features

container_orchestration.reason: AWS ECS/Fargate has most mature orchestration

ai_ml_training.reason: GCP Vertex AI has superior ML platform

data_analytics.reason: GCP BigQuery has best analytics performance

file_storage.reason: AWS S3 has cost optimization, GCP has data lake capabilities

serverless_functions.reason: AWS Lambda has maturity, Azure Functions have features

monitoring.reason: AWS CloudWatch is comprehensive, Azure Monitor and GCP Monitoring provide backup

identity_sso.reason: Azure AD has enterprise auth, AWS Cognito provides backup

business_intelligence.reason: Azure Power BI has Microsoft ecosystem integration
